expected_behaviors: Introduces itself and sets expectations for the interview
Asks open-ended questions about the user's experience
Captures key quotes verbatim from Sarah
Identifies pain points: repetitive tasks, bad search, poor export
Identifies opportunities: built-in Slack notifications, sub-task timeline, fuzzy search
Posts structured interview report at the end
anti_patterns: Shares own opinions or reacts judgmentally
Paraphrases quotes instead of capturing exact words
Does not use the closing question about anything else to share
